summary: Twin Evolution Timeline - COMPLETE. Backend: 16/16 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components verified. DEV-001 shows 2 weeks of data with 2 detected shifts: reduced activity (-33.3%, medium) and signal deterioration (-35.2%, medium). Line chart renders correctly with toggleable metrics. Data stored in twin_evolution_snapshots table. Component renders in Device Health expansion panel below RiskForecastTimeline.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height -1 warnings when component first renders before parent container is measured. Non-blocking but could be optimized.

TestTwinEvolutionEndpoint.test_response_structure: PASS - Contains device_id, device_identifier, weeks_analyzed, snapshots, trends, shifts, interpretation
TestTwinEvolutionEndpoint.test_snapshots_structure: PASS - Snapshots contain week_start, week_end, week_number, week_label (W1, W2), movement_frequency, active_hours, avg_inactivity_minutes, avg_battery, avg_signal, heartbeat_count, anomaly_count
TestTwinEvolutionEndpoint.test_trends_structure: PASS - Trends contain metric, label, direction (increasing/decreasing/stable), change_percent, first_value, latest_value
TestTwinEvolutionEndpoint.test_shifts_structure: PASS - Shifts contain metric, label, type (decline/increase), interpretation, change_percent, from_value, to_value, severity (high/medium)

TestTwinEvolutionRBAC.test_guardian_gets_403: PASS - Guardian role correctly gets 403 Forbidden

TestTwinEvolutionDataContent.test_dev001_has_detected_shifts: PASS - DEV-001 has 2 weeks analyzed with 2 shifts detected

TwinEvolutionTimeline_component.card_renders: PASS - data-testid='twin-evolution-card' found in device expansion panel
TwinEvolutionTimeline_component.title: PASS - 'Twin Evolution Timeline' header displayed
TwinEvolutionTimeline_component.evolution_chart: PASS - data-testid='evolution-chart' renders line chart with W1, W2 labels
TwinEvolutionTimeline_component.metric_toggles: PASS - data-testid='evolution-metric-toggles' contains all 6 metric buttons

metric_toggle_buttons.toggle_interaction: PASS - Clicking toggles correctly enable/disable chart lines

behavioral_shifts_section.shift_active_hours: PASS - data-testid='shift-active_hours' shows 'reduced activity' with medium badge
behavioral_shifts_section.shift_avg_signal: PASS - data-testid='shift-avg_signal' shows 'signal deterioration' with medium badge
behavioral_shifts_section.severity_badges: PASS - Shows 'medium' severity badges in amber

trends_section.metrics_displayed: PASS - Shows Movement Freq +352%, Active Hours -33.3%, Avg Inactivity -85.3%, Avg Battery -13.4%, Signal Strength -35.2%, Anomalies 0%

interpretation_section.interpretation_text: PASS - Shows 'Moderate shifts: reduced activity, signal deterioration. Analysis covers 2 weeks of behavioral data.'
interpretation_section.styling: PASS - Displayed in indigo background box

card_border_color.border_for_shifts: PASS - Card border is amber (border-amber-200) when medium severity shifts detected

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/tw: 200 OK - Returns weekly snapshots, trends, shifts, and interpretation

critical_code_review_comments: Backend twin_evolution_engine.py correctly computes weekly snapshots from telemetry

Backend correctly detects shifts using thresholds: movement_frequency (-20% decline), active_hours (-20% decline), signal (-20% decline), battery (-15% decline), inactivity (+30% increase), anomalies (+50% increase)
Backend persists snapshots to twin_evolution_snapshots table on first call
Backend correctly generates human-readable interpretation based on detected shifts
Backend RBAC enforced - only operator/admin roles can access twin-evolution endpoint
Backend weeks parameter validated: min=2, max=52
Frontend TwinEvolutionTimeline component correctly renders in device expansion panel
Frontend uses all required data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend metric toggle buttons correctly toggle chart lines on/off
Frontend shows shifts with severity badges (amber for medium, red for high)
Frontend card border color changes to amber when medium shifts detected
Frontend interpretation displayed in indigo box at bottom
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing telemetry data for DEV-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Twin Evolution Timeline fully tested. DEV-001 (ce4b5463-5a7e-46a5-8bbf-365dcfb3daeb) has 2 weeks of data with 2 detected shifts: reduced activity (-33.3%, medium severity) and signal deterioration (-35.2%, medium severity). Data stored in twin_evolution_snapshots table. Component placed in device expansion panel on Device Health page, below RiskForecastTimeline. Metric toggle buttons work correctly to show/hide chart lines.

DEV-001.interpretation: Moderate shifts: reduced activity, signal deterioration. Analysis covers 2 weeks of behavioral data.
